case_title: EMAZING BICYCLE CORPORATION VS. ELECTRIC BICYCLE SUPER STORE, LLC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF EMAZING BICYCLE CORPORATION
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,578.00 FILED BY EMAZING BICYCLE CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ELECTRIC BICYCLE SUPER STORE, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-30-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-22-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF EMAZING BICYCLE CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JANET LEE. DEFENDANT ELECTRIC BICYCLE SUPER STORE LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-15-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF EMAZING BICYCLE CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JANET LEE. DEFENDANT ELECTRIC BICYLE SUPER STORE LLC DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-04-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF EMAZING BICYCLE CORPORATION REPRESENTED BY JANET LEE, CEO.
